description: Localized metadata for a community.lexicon.app.profile record.

main.description: A locale-specific override for an app profile. This record should be published by the same DID as the canonical app profile.

locale.description: BCP 47 language tag for this localized metadata.

name.description: Localized display name of the app.

description.description: Localized description of what the app does.

logo.description: Localized logo or localized logo alt text for display.

tags.description: Localized discovery tags for filtering and search.

links.description: Localized destinations for the app. The first link should be the primary destination for this locale.

webManifestUri.description: URI of a localized Web App Manifest for richer install and directory metadata.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this localization was created.

updatedAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this localization was last updated.
